dynamic_rotation_presets.vortex_spiral: Pan = sin(t), Elevation = cos(t), Reverb = abs(sin(t/2))
dynamic_rotation_presets.fractal_scatter: Randomize (X, Y, Z) per grain in granular synthesis
dynamic_rotation_presets.center_gravity: Pull all transients to (0,0,0) during drop impact

global_creative_concepts.concept_1_cyber_shamanism: Fusion of industrial grit with tribal rhythmic motifs. 155 BPM. Dark Psy ⊗ Techno.
global_creative_concepts.concept_2_recursive_collapse: A track that 'eats itself' through increasing feedback loops and G-inversion.
global_creative_concepts.concept_3_algorithmic_soul: LFE-driven vocals explaining the process of their own creation in real-time.
global_creative_concepts.concept_4_neuro_geometry: Visual-sonic unity where bass transients trigger specific GLSL-shader transformations.
